name: oversize / malformed inbound frames -> logged + dispatch continues
doc: a >MAX_FRAME_BYTES line, a non-JSON line, and a JSON-non-object line are each logged to stderr and dropped; the next initialize still works
manifest:
[plugin]
id = "confplugin"
version = "0.1.0"
name = "Conf"
description = "conformance fixture"
min_nexo_version = ">=0.1.0"
